reviews.review_title: Love this game and i have a question
reviews.review_description:
Ok so i really love this game and its entertainment but i have a request . Could you add a Midnight Lab Mode with the following.

Midnight Lab Mode:
- all the lights in the areas are off or flickering
- monsters have glowing eyes and outline in their color
- baboons also glow in their color
- monsters get faster
- baboons get flashlights that light up the area around them
- lobby is only thing lit
- make breaker box somewhere in the map that cost an amount of gold and lasts the amount of gold they submit
- when all lights go back to normal all of the monsters go normal too
- make the portal to midnight lab dark and ominous
- baboons have to find batteries when their flashlight goes out and flightlight does not get used in lobby

Thank you for making this game and I hope you and the community like this

This game is about escaping monsters in a lab and learning lore about them. There are many gamemodes and levels. There is mild gore when a person is killed. There is a small blood splatter and a dead body( a baboon made of small orange circles). There are bundles, but they are worth every penny. There are always some toxic players like every other game on the planet, but there are people who ban those players and people who swear on the game. It is a rated teen, but it isn't bad at all. If you are a parent reading this, the game would be good for many ages, like 5 or 6 and above.

I am a parent of a Meta Quest user and am submitting a safety complaint regarding repeated exposure to hate speech and harassment in Scary Baboon.
On multiple occasions, players who appeared to be minors repeatedly used the N-word with a hard R, directed profanity at other users, and engaged in ongoing verbal harassment. In one instance, after I asked a player to stop using racial slurs around children, the player repeatedly continued the behavior and directed personal insults toward me.
My concern is not just one individual player but a recurring pattern of unsupervised children using racist and abusive language without meaningful moderation. This creates an unsafe environment for children and families using the platform.
I am requesting that Meta review moderation practices for this experience, investigate reports of hate speech, and take stronger action against accounts engaging in repeated harassment and racist conduct.

But the main reason I like this game is because I like exploring and hanging out with other people. There are also many  maps that I like. Including Caves, Mines, Backrooms,  and Camp Sundown. The game can get a little scary like when you are alone or when you are exploring somewhere dark but it’s still really fun when you get used to it. And please just report the little kids cursing btw. Anyway that’s my review on Scary Baboon and if you’ve never played please download it NOW!

1. An alarm clock for the sleeping cabin and a giant clock on the food hall.
2. CPU baboons that move around (depends on how many people are in a lobby).
3. Bins with items only used during a certain day (Like archery and axe throwing on Thursday or water items￼ on Wednesday and Free Friday has everything). 
4. Make the monsters stay around their homes during the day so we don’t see them.
5. Add food you can eat at the food hall, like spaghetti on spaghetti day.
6. Make the days of the week in the right order instead of random days.
Bonus: Fix the revamped lab baboon. Depending on where you look, your hands will disappear.

Hope this helps! :)

reviews.review_title: Great game, but has a few issues:
reviews.review_description:
I have been playing this game for over a year now, (started early 2025) and I would just like to say that this game is absolutely AMAZING. I have made so many amazing and fun memories while playing, and i even got to become an Artist Baboon in the discord server for a while! (Im joannasb btw if u wanna know which 1 :)) I really enjoy this game and love spending time with the community, but there are some "SLIGHT" issues i would like 2 talk about:
1. The moderation is not good enough to handle the thousands of kids screaming slurs all the time and needs to be improved, a prime example of this is the infection game mode.
2. The devs usually don't listen to what the community ACTUALLY wants, there are really good suggestions in the server yet most of time the devs would skim through them and then never actually add them. (and push out slop cashgrab updates that nobody wanted.)
3. The updates are pretty repetitive imo and have some sort of cashgrab bundle to get kids attention, they sometimes reuse monster models, sounds, and even jumpscares, and I feel like the game is getting less scary and more "anything to please the toddlers!'.
I hope this review helps the developers figure out what they can do to improve their game, thank you for reading. I really like your game.

I think the game is good, the monsters are good and the levels are too. It's good to play with friends and it's even a little scary. I really liked the game, and if anyone is reading this, download it, if you don't like it, you can delete it, but it's definitely worth a try. If you're afraid of where the game will take you, I'll quickly describe it here: when you load it, you're on a dark bus or somewhere where there aren't any monsters, and where it takes you straight to the lobby where you can go anywhere, to any level. I just think a scary school level would be cool, but maybe it's just my opinion. But I also like the current camp level, I enter it every day. (If there are spelling mistakes in it, it's because I made it with Google Translate, i'm not English)

reviews.review_description: A lot of people have been hating on the game recently because of changes but I'ma be honest the changes aren't even bad. Like the whole summer camp thing is AMAZING and they added so much more to do in the game then before. That's why it's 5 stars.

This game is AMAZING! It has the best move/run mechanics of every other game inspired by your game, even gorilla tag! The downside of the game is the continuous updates, kids spamming the N word, all the bugs/glitches that don’t get fixed even though there is an update every 5 seconds, but besides that if you fix all of that, the game will me hands down AMAZING!

I started in 2024 in the back room Easter update and at first it was scary but now it’s FUN! And here’s why fun game amazing staff and owners like parku and KJ1 they are all cool and cool monsters and maps! But please add back the old big Larry from forest because I saw videos of old big Larry  then and his music and his style looks so cool but now he’s literally bones and pitch black while you can keep the white monster because he looks very cool. Can you please actually add back to the actual OG from forest if you can’t that’s OK but if you can, thank you so much ! But you should go play it it is so fun! And the revamp is also fun to! But report any bad people, but if you don’t know how to report just go to the discord and report them make sure you grab their ID on the leaderboard 
By the way before I stop ending this review, I just wanna say sorry for the long review. I just love this game so much.

￼￼
￼￼

reviews.review_title: this is about it will not let me join
reviews.review_description: okay so i am trying to play scary baboon but when i'm trying to log in it keeps taking me off and i'm trying to see if the servers are down but keep saying the service are not down and i am gonna have to sue y'all because i can't play the game and i spent too much money that's it but i am gonna give it a five star cuz it is a nice game

The app let my son purchase a bundle 3 times and it's telling me it can't refund the money he paid 9.99 3 different times and only received something for one payment so I should be able to get it refunded how is the app letting him pay for the same item multiple times I'd normally leave a great review because my son loves the game but this is unacceptable

i love this game really much i play every day but there's a glitch in squid games what time i was in a server with two people and i went to mingle and for some reason it said three people in a room so both of us died. scary baboon devs if you could please fix this that would be really good.

The summer camp update is like the best update for me, people are making like little army’s and giving them the guns of the tech web, sharing, being kind and making sure everyone gets
a chance to shine 10/10 recommend you
Download.

I love the game but I’ve been playing baboon games for 10 hours and I got hider like about 10 to 20 times and seeker 80 times and I can’t pass hide and seek,dalgona,mingle,and also jump rope because it’s to long and I already made a report on my YouTube channel(sallisingleton3219) I love the game but also I keep getting my body stuck in the ground and my arms stuck in the wall in hide and seek and the seekers keep being able to kill the survivors while their in the exit and kill them and sometimes as a survivor if you go to the exit and put all shapes in the holes the exit doesn’t open…..please fix the game and 2 last things……I’ve been crying for a long time and people bully me for no reason…I’m would rate it a 1 or 2 but since I love the game I’ll rate it a 3 and also thanks to KJ1 because he helped me

Scary baboon is my favorite game and the lag is super fun and scary at the same time but I want you to add something back so I want you to add when you can unlock levels throughout the lab it would be so much better if you could add that back please oh and in revmap lab and lab in be the monster because players are getting out the map so the monster can’t get them and it’s unfair for me and other players please fix the glitch

I'm pretty late for saying a review but this game is very good! It has so many maps and levels to choose from, has a good update schedule, and cool monsters! Though some things need improvements, that's just a scratch for the game so it stays 5 stars! Feedback/ideas: add scarier/unique monsters like skinwalkers.
Revamp some maps, some feel empty.
Make a way to unstuck when stuck on walls, tables, or benches. Overall 5 stars or 4.9 stars! Very good.
